title: Youngever 8 Pack 250ML Glass Jars with Straws, Glass Cups with Straws, Mason Jars with Airtight Lids and Straws, 8 Assorted Colors
features: Mason Jar with Straws - 8 pack glass jars ( 250ml ) with assorted color lids and straws.

SAFE & REUSABLE - Made of High-Quality Material, Dishwasher safe (Top Rack). Note: Extreme temperature change will cause glass cracking. DO NOT take any glass from the freezer and put them in boiling heat directly or the other way around. DO NOT overheat them in the microwave. DO NOT heat them with lids on. NO LEAD. NO BPA
LEAK PROOF - Each jar has leak proof, easy to use, screw on lid.
ASSORTED COLORS - Fill with your favorite drinks, cocktails, juices, shakes, smoothies; and colored lids and straws make it easy to find your drink without name tags.
GREAT FOR - Great for parties, events, barbecue, picnics, birthdays, graduations, anniversaries and more. Also makes a great gift.
